## Safety checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, API keys, webhook secrets, or credentials committed
- [ ] No fake stats, fake users, fake traffic, fake analytics, or fake live AI claims
- [ ] No private docs, ai-relay content, or coordination-only material added to public repo
- [ ] No sealed files touched
- [ ] No production deploy behavior added
- [ ] Deploy-impacting changes require human approval
- [ ] Webhooks do not directly execute production deploys
- [ ] Tests/checks are passing
- [ ] Screenshots or notes included for UI changes

- [ ] Preview only
